title: Keano Brown’s murder-accused back in court
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 30-year-old man charged with the murder of Keano Brown (23) on the evening of 6 July appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday 26 August.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The 30-year-old man charged with the murder of Keano Brown (23) on the evening of 6 July appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on Tuesday 26 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Brown was fatally stabbed in Cob Street, Ext 13, allegedly by Claytin Williams. He was rushed to hospital where he later died of his injuries. Williams was arrested later the same night."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on 8 July, where the matter was postponed to 16 July for a formal bail application. However, he abandoned it instead.","html":"He appeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate’s Court on 8 July, where the matter was postponed to 16 July for a formal bail application. However, he abandoned it instead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is set to appear in court again on 23 September.","html":"He is set to appear in court again on 23 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Murder-accused abandons bail","Mossel Bay mourns Keano Brown (23)","Keano Brown murder: Accused appears in court","Mossel Bay local Keano Brown (23) murdered"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Keano Brown’s murder-accused back in court
